name: Chocolate Souffle
recipeIngredient: 75 grams dark chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas 4. Sift the cornflour and almonds together into a bowl and make a well in the center.
2. Place the milk and coffee in a saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat. Slowly whisk the milk mixture into the almond mixture and continue whisking until smooth. Return the mixture to the saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. As soon as the mixture comes to a boil, remove from heat.
3. Stir chocolate and caster sugar into the mixture and continue stirring until the chocolate melts. Whisk in the egg yolks and liqueur, cover, then set aside and keep warm.
4. Place egg whites in a bowl and beat until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in the brown sugar. Continue beating until stiff peaks form. Whisk one third of the egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture, then fold in the remaining egg white mixture.
5. Pour soufflé mixture into a greased 20cm/8in soufflé dish and bake in the oven for 20 minutes or until well risen. Sprinkle the souffle with icing sugar and serve immediately with fresh strawberries and cream.
